name: HeatCell
goal: Single colored heatmap cell for use inside <ce-heat-row> (slot mode per CDR-005), or as a standalone colored cell when used outside.
description: Carries a tone (1-5 intensity), a title (tooltip string), and a default slot for rich display content per CDR-002. When nested inside ce-heat-row the parent reads tone and title as attributes and consumes the slot text to build the heatmap data grid — the cell itself renders nothing (display:contents). When used standalone it renders a colored inline-flex box with the palette-blue ramp. Tone maps to alpha 0.05/0.175/0.30/0.425/0.55.

props.name: tone
props.description: Color intensity on a 1-5 ramp (1=faint, 5=vivid). Overrides value-based palette calculation when set explicitly. CDR-002 NOT-applicable: fixed-shape configuration number that drives layout math.

props.name: title
props.description: Tooltip text shown on hover. Maps to the HTML title attribute on the rendered cell. CDR-002 NOT-applicable: must be a plain string per HTML spec.

slots.description: Cell display content. Can carry any inline element — text, <a>, <ce-chip>, etc. per CDR-002. Read as textContent by ce-heat-row parent in slot mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border-soft
cssVariables.description: Cell border color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Cell text color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Cell font size in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Hover outline color in standalone mode.

a11y.notes: In standalone mode exposes a title attribute for tooltip. When nested inside ce-heatmap the parent provides table cell semantics via <td> with the title attribute. The default slot can carry any semantic HTML.
